title: Vegan Satay Stir Fry
description: A Malaysian-inspired stir fry made with marinated tofu and served with peanut sauce. A delicious and easy vegan alternative to traditional satay.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Replace with maple syrup for a vegan version

instructions: Marinate the tofu in a mixture of soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey (or maple syrup) for at least 30 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine peanut butter, coconut milk, and 2 tbsp of water to make the peanut sauce. Set aside.
Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the bell pepper and onion and stir-fry until tender.
Add the marinated tofu and stir-fry until golden brown.
Pour in the peanut sauce and stir-fry until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
